productDisplayName: Celine Dion Women Maroon Frame Sunglasses
description: Take shade behind these sunglasses from celine dion eyes for an A-lister appeal. Give your outfits a fresh lift with this versatile pair. Crafted with toned down glam, these shades are perfect for protecting your eyes from harmful sun rays, be it on your sun deck or on your bike! Tinted lens for use in normal daylight conditions 100% UV protection Thin metal frame in an aerodynamic design Flexible nose pads made of durable rubber to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skin Rectangular lens for absolute style and protection from elements Flexible hinges for durability and ease of wear Care Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth provided Remove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner Do not use your fingers on such stains Do not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car
